briefdescription.para: Layer offset for scene change detection IP.
Maximum number of streams supported by scene change IP.
Wait count for flush done operation.
Delay in microseconds for flush operation.
Idle timeout in microseconds for scene change IP.
Memory based mode for scene change detection.
Stream mode for scene change detection.
Write to register at specified offset.
Read from register at specified offset.
Enumeration for video color format support in scene change detection.

detaileddescription.para: Defines the supported color formats for the scene change detection IP core. These values correspond to the hardware register bits that indicate format capabilities.

briefdescription.para: Callback function pointer type for scene change detection events.

detaileddescription.para: This typedef defines the signature for callback functions that are invoked when a scene change is detected by the XVSceneChange driver.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XVSceneChange instance that triggered the callback. This allows the callback handler to identify which scene change detector instance generated the event.

simplesect.para: The callback function should not perform time-consuming operations as it may be called from an interrupt context.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the scene change driver instance using base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the scene change driver by looking up the configuration data for the specified base address and performing the core initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the physical base address of the device

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization succeeds XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the base address is not found
This function is used in SDT (System Device Tree) builds

briefdescription.para: Look up the device configuration based on base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the configuration table for an entry matching the specified base address and returns a pointer to the configuration data. If BaseAddress is 0, returns the first available configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is the physical base address of the device

simplesect.para: Pointer to XV_scenechange_Config structure if found NULL if no matching base address is found
This function is used in SDT (System Device Tree) builds

briefdescription.para: Initialize the scene change core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the scene change hardware instance by setting the base address and marking it as ready for use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is a pointer to the configuration structure

simplesect.para: This function is used in bare-metal (non-Linux) environments

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the scene change hardware core by setting the ap_start bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Check if core processing is done.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the ap_done bit in the control register to determine if the scene change core has completed processing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the ap_idle bit in the control register to determine if the scene change core is currently idle.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Check if core is ready for next input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the ap_start bit to determine if the core is ready to accept new input data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

simplesect.para: 1 if core is ready for next input, 0 otherwise

detaileddescription.para: This function enables auto-restart mode by setting bit 7 in the control register, causing the core to automatically restart after completion.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function disables auto-restart mode by clearing the control register, requiring manual restart after each completion.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the width register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the width value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the width register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the height register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the height value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the height register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the stride register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the stride value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the stride register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Set video format value for Stream 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the video format register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the video format value to set

briefdescription.para: Get video format value for Stream 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the video format register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the subsample register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the subsample value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the subsample register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Get SAD (Sum of Absolute Differences) value for Stream 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the SAD data register value for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Get SAD valid flag for Stream 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the SAD control register and returns the valid bit indicating whether the SAD value is valid.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

simplesect.para: 1 if SAD value is valid, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set frame buffer address for Stream 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the frame buffer address register for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the frame buffer address to set

briefdescription.para: Get frame buffer address for Stream 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the frame buffer address register for stream 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the width register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the width value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the width register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the height register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the height value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the height register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the stride register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the stride value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the stride register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Set video format value for Stream 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the video format register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the video format value to set

briefdescription.para: Get video format value for Stream 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the video format register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the subsample register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the subsample value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the subsample register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Get SAD (Sum of Absolute Differences) value for Stream 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the SAD data register value for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Set frame buffer address for Stream 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the frame buffer address register for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the frame buffer address to set

briefdescription.para: Get frame buffer address for Stream 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the frame buffer address register for stream 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the stride register value for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Set video format value for Stream 7.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the video format register value for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the video format value to set

briefdescription.para: Get video format value for Stream 7.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the video format register value for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the subsample register value for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the subsample value to set

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the subsample register value for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Get SAD (Sum of Absolute Differences) value for Stream 7.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the SAD register value for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: Set frame buffer address for Stream 7.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the frame buffer base address for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the frame buffer address to set

briefdescription.para: Get frame buffer address for Stream 7.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the frame buffer base address for stream 7.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the stream enable register to enable/disable specific streams for scene change detection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the stream enable bitmask (bits 0-7 for streams 0-7)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the stream enable register indicating which streams are currently enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt output by setting the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt output by clearing the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter by setting the corresponding bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the bitmask of interrupts to enable

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter by clearing the corresponding bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the bitmask of interrupts to disable

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the pending interrupts specified by the Mask parameter by writing to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the bitmask of interrupts to clear

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) indicating which interrupts are currently enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) indicating which interrupts are currently pending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the Scenechange core driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler clears the pending interrupt and determined if the source is frame done signal. If yes, starts the next scenechange processing and calls the registered callback function

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance that just interrupted.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the AP_DONE interrupt for the scene change core, allowing the interrupt handler to be triggered when processing completes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SceneChange IP instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: Configure layer parameters for a specific stream.

detaileddescription.para: This function validates and configures all layer parameters including width, height, stride, video format, subsample, and buffer address for the specified layer. It performs validation checks against IP capabilities.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the layer identifier to configure (0-7)

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if layer configuration is valid and completed XST_FAILURE if configuration parameters are invalid
Validates layer ID, width, height, and video format compatibility

briefdescription.para: Enable specific streams for scene change detection.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables one or more streams for scene change detection by writing the stream enable mask to the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance
is the bit mask of streams to enable (bit 0-7)

simplesect.para: Each bit in the streams parameter corresponds to one stream

briefdescription.para: Stop the scene change core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function stops the core by disabling interrupts, auto-restart, and initiating a flush operation. For memory-based IP, it waits for the flush to complete before returning.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the core is stopped and flush completed XST_FAILURE if flush operation timed out
For memory-based IP, this function waits up to the flush timeout period

briefdescription.para: Wait for the core to reach idle state.

detaileddescription.para: This function polls the core idle status until the core becomes idle or the timeout period is reached.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_scenechange instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the core reached idle state XST_FAILURE if the core did not reach idle within timeout period
Timeout is defined by XV_SCD_IDLE_TIMEOUT constant
